cases.expected: Selecting a self-care row updates the detail surface without leaving /workspace/consequences.
Bundle version, watch window, and patient wording preview all stay aligned to the current boundary tuple.
The admin dependency blocker remains primary content and keeps completion frozen until the blocker clears.
Completed bounded admin work shows its completion artifact and patient wording preview without redirecting to a success receipt.
Reopened or stale tuples preserve the previous draft or subtype context while freezing mutation in place.
Patient expectation preview falls back to recovery-safe wording when the boundary reopens.
Reload restores the selected consequence row and anchor when the shell can recover the same state.
Browser history returns to the same self-care/admin consequence mode instead of a detached detail page.
